feature.name: LALR parse tree core
feature.description: Extract Lark grammar loading and LALR parsing into parse trees as a standalone package.
included_behaviors: parse input with inline grammars using LALR
build Tree nodes with rule data and Token leaves
raise structured parse errors with line/column context
expose pretty() and child navigation on trees
excluded_behaviors: tree Transformer and Visitor APIs as public surface

entanglement.description: Parsing couples grammar loading, lexer tables, parser frontends, and tree construction across many cooperating modules.

output.import: from featurelifted import Lark, Tree, Token, UnexpectedToken, UnexpectedCharacters
output.signature: Lark.parse(text: str, start: str | None = None, on_error: Callable | None = None) -> Tree
